capacity_context.policy: Scarce human review capacity is reserved for blocked high-risk work before low-risk bulk refreshes dispatch.

resource_budget_record.value_hypothesis: A bulk summary refresh is useful only after protected high-risk review capacity remains available.
cost_estimate: large batch of low-risk review checks
displaced_costs: dispatch would delay a blocked high-risk safety review
resource_budget_record.quality_predicate: The refresh can wait without losing evidence or safety-critical state.
safety_gates: human review capacity remains reserved for high-risk work
low-risk batch may rerun after protected queue pressure falls
resource_budget_record.escalation_rule: Dispatch only after blocked high-risk review refs clear or a reviewer explicitly adds capacity.
residuals: Review capacity is reserved for high-risk blocked work.
The low-risk refresh remains deferred without claiming a scheduler result.

non_claims: Does not promote any support state.
Does not prove scheduler behavior, runtime behavior, load stability, review-queue optimization, or economic outcomes.
